raw.subject: Your Visalia page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you've been sharing your expertise with a high level of professionalism, making it clear that you stand out in the Visalia area for your automotive and towing services.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on bookings and calls that could be directed to your business more efficiently.

I sketched out a rough idea for a homepage from your Facebook posts, incorporating some of the key details you've shared with your community. It includes a prominent emergency call CTA, a list of your services, and a service area map to help potential customers find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/r-r-automotive-and-towing-visalia

This would be a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. I'd love to discuss the details with you further. Please reply or let's schedule a quick call to explore how we can help you showcase your services online.
